nasb.text: Moved with compassion, Jesus touched their eyes; and immediately they regained their sight and followed Him.

esv.text: And Jesus in pity touched their eyes, and immediately they recovered their sight and followed him.

cnv.text: 耶穌就憐憫他們，摸他們的眼睛。他們立刻能看見，就跟從了耶穌。

ccb.text: 耶稣就动了慈心，摸他们的眼睛，他们立刻得见光明，并跟从了耶稣。

csbs.text: 耶稣动了怜悯之心，摸了他们的眼睛。他们立刻重见光明，于是跟随了耶稣。
